ham.subject: Security Alert: Mandatory Patch Deployment for Workstations
ham.body:
Hello Team,

The IT Security Team has identified a critical vulnerability (CVE-2026-1234) affecting Windows 10 Pro and 11. A patch will be deployed to all managed devices on Friday, 12 March 2026 at 16:00 UTC.

All users are advised to keep devices connected and idle during the window to ensure the update completes successfully. No action is required except to check that your device restarts after the deployment.

Thank you for your cooperation.

- IT Security Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Corporate Account Is Suspended – Verify Immediately
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

We have detected multiple failed login attempts on your corporate account. To prevent permanent lockout, please verify your identity by following the link below.

<URL>

This email is automated. Do not reply. The link will take you to a secure page where you can submit your username and password.

If no action is taken within 24 hours, your account may be disabled permanently.

Thank you for your prompt attention.
